1. AI (Only) — No ML
🔹 Project: Intelligent Route Solver
Build a system that finds optimal paths (like Google Maps logic)
Use:
BFS, DFS, A*
Heuristics
Input: Graph (cities / nodes)
Output: Best path

👉 Teaches: search + problem-solving (core AI thinking)



🚀 2. AI + ML
🔹 Project: Smart Spam Classifier API
Build a spam detection system
Use:
Logistic Regression / Naive Bayes
Feature extraction (TF-IDF)
Add:
REST API (FastAPI/Django)

👉 Teaches: data → model → API



3. AI + ML + DL
🔹 Project: Image Classification System
Example: Detect cats vs dogs
Use:
CNN (TensorFlow/PyTorch)
Add:
Upload image → prediction API

👉 Teaches: deep learning + real inference



🚀 4. AI + ML + DL + Generative AI
🔹 Project: Image Generator (Mini Stable Diffusion)
Input: text prompt
Output: generated image
Use:
GAN or diffusion model (simplified)

👉 Teaches: how models create data, not just classify

⚠️ Don’t overcomplicate—start with a basic GAN



🚀 5. AI + ML + DL + GenAI + LLM
🔹 Project: AI Knowledge Assistant (RAG System)
Upload PDFs / docs
Ask questions → get answers
Use:
Embeddings
Vector DB (FAISS)
LLM API

👉 Teaches:

RAG (most important real-world skill)
Context handling



🚀 6. AI + ML + DL + GenAI + LLM + Agentic AI
🔹 Project: Autonomous Research Agent
Input: “Analyze this topic”
Agent will:
Search web
Read content
Summarize
Store memory
Use:
Tools (APIs)
Memory (vector DB)
Multi-step reasoning

👉 Teaches:

Real AI systems, not just models
Planning + tool usage




🚀 7. Data Engineering (Parallel Track)
🔹 Project: End-to-End Data Pipeline
Build pipeline:
Ingest data (API / CSV)
Clean using Pandas
Store in SQL
Serve to ML model
Add:
Airflow (or cron jobs)
Logging + monitoring

👉 Teaches:

Production data flow (critical skill)




Instead of 7 separate projects:

👉 Build ONE evolving system:

Start with rule-based AI
Add ML model
Upgrade to DL
Add generation
Add LLM
Convert into agent
